America's Premier Government Contract Advisory Systems

We put small business in the room.

A fully operational government contracting division — installed inside your company. Compliance, certifications, bid intelligence, and complete financing. Zero out-of-pocket.

Check If I Qualify See Our Method
$0B+ Federal Contracts Annually
0% Mandated Set-Aside
$0B+ Awarded for GCAS Clients
0+ Years of Experience
"When a client tells me they sent their daughter to college because they won a government contract — that means more to me than any fee."
Jason Webb · Founder & Managing Advisor · 30+ Years

Explore the Program

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Each pillar of the GCAS Network is its own discipline — and its own page. Click to go deep.

The Defining Misconception

Compliance wins.
Not the low bid.

A contracting officer never sees your price until your paperwork passes. We build the compliance infrastructure that gets you in the room.

Read the method

The GCAS Professional Network

200+ experts.
One turnkey solution.

Technical writers, pricing specialists, SMEs, procurement consultants, compliance auditors, and HR architects — all working on your single bid.

Meet the network

Safety · Compliance · Culture

The government's highest priority
is yours.

OSHA, HAZMAT, First Aid, drug-free workplace, employee handbook, photo documentation. Every safeguard a contracting officer expects — installed and showcased.

See what we install

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

Explore SBA designations

Become a GCAS Consultant

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Apply to train

Client Stories

Real people.
Real transformations.

Not just contract wins — kids through college, debts paid off, second-generation businesses funded. The reason we keep doing this.

Read their stories

Specialty Tracks

Deeper still.

Specialties

10 specialty divisions.

Roofing, HVAC, pest control, grounds, accounting, tree, construction, painting, pressure washing, security.

View specialties

Contract Vehicles

IDIQ. MATOC. SubNet.

Unlock the hidden federal subcontracting market — the largest pool of awards small businesses never see.

Tour the vehicles

Consulting

For active contractors.

Bid strategy, pricing intelligence, compliance uplift, and contract performance advisory for businesses already in the market.

See consulting

Mentorship

1:1 with Jason Webb.

For owners building a durable, multi-generational government contracting operation. By application only.

Apply for mentorship

Get Started

Performance-based fees.
Zero out-of-pocket.

Qualifying clients are financed through the award cycle. All costs rebated on first award. Your net financial risk to enter the government market is zero.

Check if I qualify

Begin

Your government contract
starts with one conversation.

30 minutes. No obligation. We'll review your business and tell you honestly whether GCAS is the right fit.

Check If I Qualify Schedule Discovery Call

A fully operational government contracting division — installed inside your company. Compliance, certifications, bid intelligence, and complete financing. Zero out-of-pocket.

Check If I Qualify See Our Method
$0B+ Federal Contracts Annually
0% Mandated Set-Aside
$0B+ Awarded for GCAS Clients
0+ Years of Experience
"When a client tells me they sent their daughter to college because they won a government contract — that means more to me than any fee."
Jason Webb · Founder & Managing Advisor · 30+ Years

Explore the Program

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Each pillar of the GCAS Network is its own discipline — and its own page. Click to go deep.

The Defining Misconception

Compliance wins.
Not the low bid.

A contracting officer never sees your price until your paperwork passes. We build the compliance infrastructure that gets you in the room.

Read the method

The GCAS Professional Network

200+ experts.
One turnkey solution.

Technical writers, pricing specialists, SMEs, procurement consultants, compliance auditors, and HR architects — all working on your single bid.

Meet the network

Safety · Compliance · Culture

The government's highest priority
is yours.

OSHA, HAZMAT, First Aid, drug-free workplace, employee handbook, photo documentation. Every safeguard a contracting officer expects — installed and showcased.

See what we install

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

Explore SBA designations

Become a GCAS Consultant

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Apply to train

Client Stories

Real people.
Real transformations.

Not just contract wins — kids through college, debts paid off, second-generation businesses funded. The reason we keep doing this.

Read their stories

Specialty Tracks

Deeper still.

Specialties

10 specialty divisions.

Roofing, HVAC, pest control, grounds, accounting, tree, construction, painting, pressure washing, security.

View specialties

Contract Vehicles

IDIQ. MATOC. SubNet.

Unlock the hidden federal subcontracting market — the largest pool of awards small businesses never see.

Tour the vehicles

Consulting

For active contractors.

Bid strategy, pricing intelligence, compliance uplift, and contract performance advisory for businesses already in the market.

See consulting

Mentorship

1:1 with Jason Webb.

For owners building a durable, multi-generational government contracting operation. By application only.

Apply for mentorship

Get Started

Performance-based fees.
Zero out-of-pocket.

Qualifying clients are financed through the award cycle. All costs rebated on first award. Your net financial risk to enter the government market is zero.

Check if I qualify

Begin

Your government contract
starts with one conversation.

30 minutes. No obligation. We'll review your business and tell you honestly whether GCAS is the right fit.

Each pillar of the GCAS Network is its own discipline — and its own page. Click to go deep.

The Defining Misconception

Compliance wins.
Not the low bid.

A contracting officer never sees your price until your paperwork passes. We build the compliance infrastructure that gets you in the room.

Read the method

The GCAS Professional Network

200+ experts.
One turnkey solution.

Technical writers, pricing specialists, SMEs, procurement consultants, compliance auditors, and HR architects — all working on your single bid.

Meet the network

Safety · Compliance · Culture

The government's highest priority
is yours.

OSHA, HAZMAT, First Aid, drug-free workplace, employee handbook, photo documentation. Every safeguard a contracting officer expects — installed and showcased.

See what we install

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

Explore SBA designations

Become a GCAS Consultant

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Apply to train

Real people.
Real transformations.

Not just contract wins — kids through college, debts paid off, second-generation businesses funded. The reason we keep doing this.

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Apply to train

Real people.
Real transformations.

Not just contract wins — kids through college, debts paid off, second-generation businesses funded. The reason we keep doing this.

America's Premier Government Contract Advisory Systems

We put small business in the room.

A fully operational government contracting division — installed inside your company. Compliance, certifications, bid intelligence, and complete financing. Zero out-of-pocket.

Check If I Qualify See Our Method
$0B+ Federal Contracts Annually
0% Mandated Set-Aside
$0B+ Awarded for GCAS Clients
0+ Years of Experience
"When a client tells me they sent their daughter to college because they won a government contract — that means more to me than any fee."
Jason Webb · Founder & Managing Advisor · 30+ Years

Explore the Program

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Each pillar of the GCAS Network is its own discipline — and its own page. Click to go deep.

The Defining Misconception

Compliance wins.
Not the low bid.

A contracting officer never sees your price until your paperwork passes. We build the compliance infrastructure that gets you in the room.

Read the method

The GCAS Professional Network

200+ experts.
One turnkey solution.

Technical writers, pricing specialists, SMEs, procurement consultants, compliance auditors, and HR architects — all working on your single bid.

Meet the network

Safety · Compliance · Culture

The government's highest priority
is yours.

OSHA, HAZMAT, First Aid, drug-free workplace, employee handbook, photo documentation. Every safeguard a contracting officer expects — installed and showcased.

See what we install

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

Explore SBA designations

Become a GCAS Consultant

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Apply to train

Client Stories

Real people.
Real transformations.

Not just contract wins — kids through college, debts paid off, second-generation businesses funded. The reason we keep doing this.

Read their stories

Specialty Tracks

Deeper still.

Specialties

10 specialty divisions.

Roofing, HVAC, pest control, grounds, accounting, tree, construction, painting, pressure washing, security.

View specialties

Contract Vehicles

IDIQ. MATOC. SubNet.

Unlock the hidden federal subcontracting market — the largest pool of awards small businesses never see.

Tour the vehicles

Consulting

For active contractors.

Bid strategy, pricing intelligence, compliance uplift, and contract performance advisory for businesses already in the market.

See consulting

Mentorship

1:1 with Jason Webb.

For owners building a durable, multi-generational government contracting operation. By application only.

Apply for mentorship

Get Started

Performance-based fees.
Zero out-of-pocket.

Qualifying clients are financed through the award cycle. All costs rebated on first award. Your net financial risk to enter the government market is zero.

America's Premier Government Contract Advisory Systems

We put small business in the room.

A fully operational government contracting division — installed inside your company. Compliance, certifications, bid intelligence, and complete financing. Zero out-of-pocket.

Check If I Qualify See Our Method
$0B+ Federal Contracts Annually
0% Mandated Set-Aside
$0B+ Awarded for GCAS Clients
0+ Years of Experience
"When a client tells me they sent their daughter to college because they won a government contract — that means more to me than any fee."
Jason Webb · Founder & Managing Advisor · 30+ Years

Explore the Program

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Each pillar of the GCAS Network is its own discipline — and its own page. Click to go deep.

The Defining Misconception

Compliance wins.
Not the low bid.

A contracting officer never sees your price until your paperwork passes. We build the compliance infrastructure that gets you in the room.

Read the method

The GCAS Professional Network

200+ experts.
One turnkey solution.

Technical writers, pricing specialists, SMEs, procurement consultants, compliance auditors, and HR architects — all working on your single bid.

Meet the network

Safety · Compliance · Culture

The government's highest priority
is yours.

OSHA, HAZMAT, First Aid, drug-free workplace, employee handbook, photo documentation. Every safeguard a contracting officer expects — installed and showcased.

See what we install

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

Explore SBA designations

Become a GCAS Consultant

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Apply to train

Client Stories

Real people.
Real transformations.

Not just contract wins — kids through college, debts paid off, second-generation businesses funded. The reason we keep doing this.

Read their stories

Specialty Tracks

Deeper still.

Specialties

10 specialty divisions.

Roofing, HVAC, pest control, grounds, accounting, tree, construction, painting, pressure washing, security.

View specialties

Contract Vehicles

IDIQ. MATOC. SubNet.

Unlock the hidden federal subcontracting market — the largest pool of awards small businesses never see.

Tour the vehicles

Consulting

For active contractors.

Bid strategy, pricing intelligence, compliance uplift, and contract performance advisory for businesses already in the market.

See consulting

Mentorship

1:1 with Jason Webb.

For owners building a durable, multi-generational government contracting operation. By application only.

Apply for mentorship

Get Started

Performance-based fees.
Zero out-of-pocket.

Qualifying clients are financed through the award cycle. All costs rebated on first award. Your net financial risk to enter the government market is zero.

Check if I qualify

Begin

Your government contract
starts with one conversation.

30 minutes. No obligation. We'll review your business and tell you honestly whether GCAS is the right fit.

Check If I Qualify Schedule Discovery Call

A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Apply to train

Client Stories

Real people.
Real transformations.

Not just contract wins — kids through college, debts paid off, second-generation businesses funded. The reason we keep doing this.

Read their stories

Deeper still.

Specialties

10 specialty divisions.

Roofing, HVAC, pest control, grounds, accounting, tree, construction, painting, pressure washing, security.

View specialties

IDIQ. MATOC. SubNet.

Unlock the hidden federal subcontracting market — the largest pool of awards small businesses never see.

200+ experts.

Safety · Compliance · Culture

is yours.

OSHA, HAZMAT, First Aid, drug-free workplace, employee handbook, photo documentation. Every safeguard a contracting officer expects — installed and showcased.

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

The GCAS Professional Network

200+ experts.

Technical writers, pricing specialists, SMEs, procurement consultants, compliance auditors, and HR architects — all working on your single bid.

Safety · Compliance · Culture

The government's highest priority
is yours.

OSHA, HAZMAT, First Aid, drug-free workplace, employee handbook, photo documentation. Every safeguard a contracting officer expects — installed and showcased.

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

Become a GCAS Consultant

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

America's Premier Government Contract Advisory Systems

We put small business in the room.

A fully operational government contracting division — installed inside your company. Compliance, certifications, bid intelligence, and complete financing. Zero out-of-pocket.

Check If I Qualify See Our Method
$0B+ Federal Contracts Annually
0% Mandated Set-Aside
$0B+ Awarded for GCAS Clients
0+ Years of Experience
"When a client tells me they sent their daughter to college because they won a government contract — that means more to me than any fee."
Jason Webb · Founder & Managing Advisor · 30+ Years

Explore the Program

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Each pillar of the GCAS Network is its own discipline — and its own page. Click to go deep.

The Defining Misconception

Compliance wins.
Not the low bid.

A contracting officer never sees your price until your paperwork passes. We build the compliance infrastructure that gets you in the room.

Read the method

The GCAS Professional Network

200+ experts.
One turnkey solution.

Technical writers, pricing specialists, SMEs, procurement consultants, compliance auditors, and HR architects — all working on your single bid.

Meet the network

Safety · Compliance · Culture

The government's highest priority
is yours.

OSHA, HAZMAT, First Aid, drug-free workplace, employee handbook, photo documentation. Every safeguard a contracting officer expects — installed and showcased.

See what we install

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

Explore SBA designations

Become a GCAS Consultant

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Apply to train

Client Stories

Real people.
Real transformations.

Not just contract wins — kids through college, debts paid off, second-generation businesses funded. The reason we keep doing this.

Read their stories

Specialty Tracks

Deeper still.

Specialties

10 specialty divisions.

Roofing, HVAC, pest control, grounds, accounting, tree, construction, painting, pressure washing, security.

View specialties

Contract Vehicles

IDIQ. MATOC. SubNet.

Unlock the hidden federal subcontracting market — the largest pool of awards small businesses never see.

Tour the vehicles

Consulting

For active contractors.

Bid strategy, pricing intelligence, compliance uplift, and contract performance advisory for businesses already in the market.

See consulting

Mentorship

1:1 with Jason Webb.

For owners building a durable, multi-generational government contracting operation. By application only.

Apply for mentorship

Get Started

Performance-based fees.
Zero out-of-pocket.

Qualifying clients are financed through the award cycle. All costs rebated on first award. Your net financial risk to enter the government market is zero.

Check if I qualify

Begin

Your government contract
starts with one conversation.

30 minutes. No obligation. We'll review your business and tell you honestly whether GCAS is the right fit.

The Defining Misconception

Compliance wins.
Not the low bid.

A contracting officer never sees your price until your paperwork passes. We build the compliance infrastructure that gets you in the room.

The GCAS Professional Network

200+ experts.
One turnkey solution.

Technical writers, pricing specialists, SMEs, procurement consultants, compliance auditors, and HR architects — all working on your single bid.

Meet the network

Safety · Compliance · Culture

The government's highest priority
is yours.

OSHA, HAZMAT, First Aid, drug-free workplace, employee handbook, photo documentation. Every safeguard a contracting officer expects — installed and showcased.

See what we install

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

Become a GCAS Consultant

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Apply to train

America's Premier Government Contract Advisory Systems

We put small business in the room.

A fully operational government contracting division — installed inside your company. Compliance, certifications, bid intelligence, and complete financing. Zero out-of-pocket.

Check If I Qualify See Our Method
$0B+ Federal Contracts Annually
0% Mandated Set-Aside
$0B+ Awarded for GCAS Clients
0+ Years of Experience
"When a client tells me they sent their daughter to college because they won a government contract — that means more to me than any fee."
Jason Webb · Founder & Managing Advisor · 30+ Years

Explore the Program

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Each pillar of the GCAS Network is its own discipline — and its own page. Click to go deep.

The Defining Misconception

Compliance wins.
Not the low bid.

A contracting officer never sees your price until your paperwork passes. We build the compliance infrastructure that gets you in the room.

Read the method

The GCAS Professional Network

200+ experts.
One turnkey solution.

Technical writers, pricing specialists, SMEs, procurement consultants, compliance auditors, and HR architects — all working on your single bid.

Meet the network

Safety · Compliance · Culture

The government's highest priority
is yours.

OSHA, HAZMAT, First Aid, drug-free workplace, employee handbook, photo documentation. Every safeguard a contracting officer expects — installed and showcased.

See what we install

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

Explore SBA designations

Become a GCAS Consultant

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Apply to train

Client Stories

Real people.
Real transformations.

Not just contract wins — kids through college, debts paid off, second-generation businesses funded. The reason we keep doing this.

Read their stories

Specialty Tracks

Deeper still.

Specialties

10 specialty divisions.

Roofing, HVAC, pest control, grounds, accounting, tree, construction, painting, pressure washing, security.

View specialties

Contract Vehicles

IDIQ. MATOC. SubNet.

Unlock the hidden federal subcontracting market — the largest pool of awards small businesses never see.

Tour the vehicles

Consulting

For active contractors.

Bid strategy, pricing intelligence, compliance uplift, and contract performance advisory for businesses already in the market.

See consulting

Mentorship

1:1 with Jason Webb.

For owners building a durable, multi-generational government contracting operation. By application only.

Apply for mentorship

Get Started

Performance-based fees.
Zero out-of-pocket.

Qualifying clients are financed through the award cycle. All costs rebated on first award. Your net financial risk to enter the government market is zero.

Check if I qualify

Begin

Your government contract
starts with one conversation.

30 minutes. No obligation. We'll review your business and tell you honestly whether GCAS is the right fit.

200+ experts.

Safety · Compliance · Culture

is yours.

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

© 2026 GCAS Network · Government Contract Advisory Systems · All rights reserved.

Our Specialty Divisions

Ten Disciplines.
One Turnkey Advantage.

GCAS Network maintains operational depth across the ten specialty trades most actively procured by federal, state, and local agencies. Every discipline is supported by dedicated pricing specialists, compliance auditors, and a documented track record of government performance.

Proven · Compliant · Award-Ready

Where We Compete — and Win

The Ten Core Specialties.

These are the verticals where GCAS has the deepest institutional expertise, the most seasoned subject-matter experts, and the most reliable incumbent pricing intelligence. Contract volume in these codes moves through our platform daily.

Roofing

Full-scope commercial and industrial roofing for federal facilities, military installations, and municipal portfolios — new construction, replacements, repairs, and maintenance contracts.

NAICS 238160

HVAC

Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning installation, retrofit, and preventive maintenance — including energy-efficiency retrofits under federal sustainability mandates.

NAICS 238220

Pest Control

Integrated Pest Management (IPM) programs for government facilities — regulatory-grade reporting, EPA-compliant application, and full documentation required by USDA and GSA contracts.

NAICS 561710

Grounds Maintenance

Year-round landscaping, mowing, irrigation, seasonal color, snow removal, and athletic field care across federal campuses, national parks, and municipal property portfolios.

NAICS 561730

Accounting

DCAA-compliant accounting support, indirect rate structures, timekeeping systems, audit readiness, and government-grade financial reporting for cost-reimbursable and T&M contracts.

NAICS 541219

Tree Trimming

ISA-certified arborist services — pruning, removal, stump grinding, storm response, and right-of-way clearance for federal agencies, utilities, and transportation authorities.

NAICS 561730

Construction

General and specialty construction — new build, renovation, tenant improvement, disaster recovery — executed under Davis-Bacon, Buy American, and FAR compliance frameworks.

NAICS 236220

Painting

Interior and exterior painting, industrial coatings, lead-paint abatement, and specialty finishes for military housing, VA medical centers, and federal office portfolios.

NAICS 238320

Pressure Washing

High- and low-pressure exterior cleaning for facilities, fleets, hardscape, and stormwater compliance — environmentally compliant effluent capture included.

NAICS 561790

Security Guard Services

Armed and unarmed contract security, access control, patrol, and executive protection — cleared personnel, SCA-compliant wage determinations, and AS9100/ISO documentation.

NAICS 561612

Why These Ten

Chosen Because Government Needs Them Every Single Day.

Agencies do not select trades at random. They issue recurring, predictable, multi-year contracts for the services that keep facilities operating. These ten specialties represent the bulk of that recurring demand — and they are where a well-prepared small business can build durable revenue.

01 · Recurring

Multi-Year IDIQ Volume

Federal facility maintenance contracts are awarded in 3- to 5-year Indefinite Delivery / Indefinite Quantity vehicles — the kind of revenue visibility that lets a small business scale confidently.

02 · Set-Aside

Small Business Preferred

Every specialty here falls squarely inside the 23% federal small-business set-aside mandate — often with additional preferences for 8(a), HUBZone, SDVOSB, and WOSB designations.

03 · Scalable

Room to Grow Vertically

Each discipline has a defined ladder from first municipal award → state-level IDIQ → federal prime contract. GCAS maps the ladder and accompanies you up each rung.

Don't See Your Trade?

We Serve Over Thirty Additional Trade Codes.

The ten above are our deepest specialties, but our 90,000-agency search platform and subject-matter-expert network cover dozens of additional NAICS codes. If your company operates in a trade that serves government, we almost certainly have the intelligence, pricing data, and compliance playbook to get you competing.

Check If I Qualify → Talk To A Consultant
